name: Jollof Rice
description: A popular West African rice dish cooked in tomato sauce and spices.
instructions: Cook tomatoes and pepper sauce, add rice, and simmer until done.

name: Fried Rice
description: Colorful rice mixed with vegetables and protein.
instructions: Stir-fry vegetables, add rice and seasoning, mix well.

name: Egusi Soup
description: Soup made with melon seeds and assorted meat.
instructions: Cook melon paste in palm oil, add meat and vegetables.

name: Ogbono Soup
description: Draw soup made from wild mango seeds.
instructions: Mix ground ogbono with oil and simmer with meat.

name: Suya
instructions: Season beef and grill over open flame.

name: Moi Moi
description: Steamed bean pudding rich in protein.
instructions: Blend beans, mix ingredients, and steam.

name: Akara
description: Deep-fried bean cakes enjoyed at breakfast.
instructions: Blend beans and fry spoonfuls in hot oil.

name: Banga Soup
description: Palm nut soup popular in southern Nigeria.
instructions: Boil palm extract and add meat and spices.

name: Pepper Soup
description: Spicy broth with meat or fish.
instructions: Boil meat with spices and pepper.

name: Amala
description: Smooth yam flour swallow eaten with soups.
instructions: Mix yam flour in boiling water until smooth.

name: Pounded Yam
description: Soft yam dough served with soup.
instructions: Boil yam and pound until smooth.

name: Boli (Roasted Plantain)
description: Roasted plantain served with pepper sauce.
instructions: Roast plantain over fire and serve.

name: Ofada Rice
description: Local rice served with spicy sauce.
instructions: Cook rice and serve with spicy sauce.

name: Nkwobi
instructions: Cook cow foot and mix with spicy palm oil sauce.

name: Zobo Drink
instructions: Boil hibiscus leaves and add flavoring.
